description: Represents the extraction that the user wants to extract.

data.description: The binary data to request extraction for.
data.title: data

internal.description: If true, this extraction is for internal use only. This can be used by agentic systems to mark an extraction as internal only as opposed to user facing.
internal.title: internal

isFile.description: If true, the data of the extraction is a file.
isFile.title: isFile

isStored.description: If true, indicates that the file has been stored.
isStored.title: isStored

kind.description: The kind of content carried by this extraction. Used together with role to label what the extracted blob represents so the UI can render it correctly and analyzers can dispatch appropriately: - Message: free-form natural language (default). - Thinking: model reasoning trace (e.g. Anthropic thinking, OpenAI reasoning, Gemini thought). - ToolDefinition: tool/function schema advertised to the model (name, description, JSON schema). - ToolInput: structured arguments the model passes when invoking a tool. - ToolOutput: result returned to the model after a tool call. - File: uploaded or attached file payload. - Resource: externally-supplied context injected into the prompt (RAG document, search result, MCP resource). - Event: control or lifecycle marker with no analyzable content.
kind.title: kind

label.description: Contains events and other information that are not actual user content, and will not go through analysis.
label.title: label

role.description: The role of the message represented by this extraction.
role.title: role

toolResults.description: Tool call results which are passed in to this request.
toolResults.title: toolResults

toolUses.description: Tool uses as requested by a model.
toolUses.title: toolUses

title: ExtractionRequest
